calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

Plaintiff Saba Hilaws Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Miroslav Bokaric To Further Respond To Request For Production Of Documents Set Two Numbers 23 25 And 27 And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant?S Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-23-2015 Text Ruling

Plaintiff Saba Hilaw?S Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Miroslav Bokaric To Further Respond To Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant?S Counsel Of Record, Ryan Kraft
Off Calendar Oct-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative rulings as follows:

1) Plaintiff Saba Hilaw's Motion To Compel Defendant Miroslav Bokaric To Further Respond To Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant's Counsel Of Record, Ryan Kraft is DENIED. The defendant's response sufficiently described that there were no responsive documents beyond the documents received via subpoena. Those subpoenaed documents were made equally available to the plaintiff and the defendant has no obligation to produce those documents to the plaintiff. (See Bunnell v. Superior Court (1967) 254 Cal.App.2d 720, 723-24.) Each party's request for sanctions is DENIED. The prevailing party is to prepare an order.

2) Plaintiff Saba Hilaw's Motion To Compel Defendant Miroslav Bokaric To Further Respond To Request For Production Of Documents Set Two Numbers 23 25 and 27 and Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant's Counsel is DENIED. While the defendant's objections based on work product or attorney-client privilege are not well taken, there remains no independent obligation of a party to produce to an opposing party documents which have been made equally available to the opposing party during discovery. (See CCP section 2019.030; Bunnell v. Superior Court (1967) 254 Cal.App.2d 720, 723-24). The prevailing is to prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
